subject: [SO] 17.2.0
commit_message:
[SO] 17.2.0

- 1.19.0 images
- 1.15.0 cnf-adapter and cnf-lcm image
- adjust memory request/limits to use less resources
- replace encrypted credentials with plaintext defaults [0]

[0] custom encryption has been removed in this release

Issue-ID: SO-4305
Change-Id: Ibc9ebb5928edbe6ad1d319b701f83e7ea3c26ba4
Signed-off-by: Fiete Ostkamp <fiete.ostkamp@telekom.de>
